background: We have established a test of $H_0: \mu=170$ versus $H_{\mathrm{a}}: \mu>170$ in a population with $\sigma=40$ pounds. A simple random sample of $n=64$ is associated with $S E_{\bar{x}}=\frac{40}{\sqrt{64}}=5$.

task.query: Sample 1. What is the $z$-statistic for a sample in which $\bar{x}=173$?
Sample 2. What is the $z$-statistic in a sample with $\bar{x}=185$?
